en: If your company performs any of the following services and is required to maintain the relevant certification(s) for those services, you will be asked to provide your certificate in a subsequent form.
Ireland Tax Clearance Certificate Applicability Assessment
Does your company perform services which would require you to obtain a Tax Clearance Certificate from The Office of the Revenue Commissioners?
Please select from the following reasons your company is exempt from needing a Tax Clearance Certificate in Ireland.
The company does not hold licenses or permits, specified by the Revenue, in which require a Tax Clearance Certificate.
Please explain why your company is exempt from needing a Tax Clearance Certificate in Ireland.
By providing your electronic signature, you confirm that the information submitted in this questionnaire is true, complete, and accurate in accordance with Irish legislation.
